steps.title: Identify the crucial contrast
steps.content: The passage contrasts: arthropod average > bird average, but individual bird studies exceeded the arthropod average. This overlap is the pivotal signal.

steps.title: Apply the contrast to the choices
steps.content:
C captures this overlap: some bird studies found larger effects than some arthropod studies.
  • A adds unsupported specifics
  • B contradicts the stated average
  • D references information never discussed
.

This matches choice C — C is correct.
